emails.subject: RE: traders
emails.body: RE: traders Who, so far, has decided to leave (besides John Arnold)? To: Sever, Stephanie; Kenne, Dawn C.

emails.subject: RE: traders
emails.body: Arnold, Kevin Ruscitti, Brad McKay are the only ones so far. I'm sure there are a few more I don't know about yet. How is your group looking, who's left, are you in charge now? To: Keiser, Kam

emails.subject: RE: traders
emails.body: I heard Pete Keavey and Darren Farmer, too. Stephanie just told me that! 30 of the 39 people are still here in EOL. I am not in charge...scary if I was. Are you guys going to the Houstonian tomorrow for the Overview/Orientation? Dawn To: Kenne, Dawn C.
